content:
***SPOILERS FOR CHAPTER 8 AND 9, as well as minor spoilers for Arc 2 Chapter 1***

## What is the arc 1 GDoll incident? ##
The GDoll incident is a significant event that shakes the dynamics of the world and directly affects the events of Chapters 8 and 9... assuming you can find it.
Yep, one of the most important side stories in the game never existed because its cut content that never got released, so all we have is tiny scraps and implications. So here I am answering the question everyone asks.

## Who is arc 1 Gdoll? ##
Arc 1 Gdoll (im calling her GDoll from now on) is a copy of arc 2 Gdoll (GDoll2) sent to world 317 to "grant humanity the mercy of a swift destruction". Let's just say she knows something the Keeper doesn't yet (until arc 2).

## The Bare Bones Timeline of the GDoll incident ##
no timestamps because i have no idea when this happens.

> Elworth's Returnee (1 month after Ch 7)
>Dexter notes the number of natural disasters are increasing (likely orchestrated by GDoll)
> ???
>Keeper recovers GDoll from an avalanche. (arc2 info, might change as the translation gets updated)
> 1 month before Ch 8
>GDoll infiltrates Mythag University, impersonating as Doll.
>Keeper meets GDoll again, falls for her disguise.
>While disguised, GDoll almost triggers a D-Rift using a silver bomb.
>Keeper and Alistair confront and capture GDoll, and seal her in a sealing array somewhere in the depths of the Black Pool.
> some time later
>Keeper approaches GDoll (still sealed) to ask about what she saw that drove her to destruction, Alistair warns that she might try to sway Keeper to her side.
>The discussion is fruitless.
> ???
>Gdoll breaks and escapes the sealing array by destroying her own body and transferring her consciousness to one of Doll's spare bodies.
>GDoll contacts Juliette.
> Ch 8
>GDoll detonates the Black Pool and dispels Mythag's mist wall.
>GDoll traps and disconnects Doll from her body as she tried to contact Keeper.
